package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for json_marshal_then_write: `data, _ := json.Marshal(v); w.Write(data)` when `json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(v)` would stream directly
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule607NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario607Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule607NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
